creator: glebius@FreeBSD.org
text:
Oleg,

  now we are preparing for the last 4.x release. It is important
to fix as much problems as possible before 4.11 is released.

Please try to reproduce the problem on RELENG_4 or 4.10-RELEASE. If
it is reproducible, try to build kernel with debug symbols and obtain
a crashdump:

http://www.freebsd.org/doc/en/books/developers-handbook/kerneldebug.html

Thanks in advance for your feedback!

-- 
Totus tuus, Glebius.
GLEBIUS-RIPN GLEB-RIPE
